approval.description: Human gate decision for the current DevHarness approval step.
approval.x-usage: Use approved to continue, rejected to revise the gated draft step, and blocked only when blocker explains why the run must pause recoverably.

results.description: Optional compact summary of the human approval decision or feedback.
results.x-usage: Use as supporting human gate context; do not route from this field.

artifacts.description: Optional artifacts attached by the approval gate.
artifacts.x-usage: Use only when the approval gate explicitly attaches artifacts.

blocker.x-usage: Surface this blocker before continuing; do not infer missing blocker details from prose.
